content_types.title: TV Series
content_types.description: A TV series with modular block seasons and episode references.

content_types.title: Site Config
content_types.description: Global site configuration (site name, feature flags). Header, footer, and navigation are separate content types.

content_types.title: Person
content_types.description: Cast and crew member. Referenced by movie and tv_series.

content_types.title: Page
content_types.description: A landing page composed of ordered content sections. Used to build the homepage and future marketing/landing pages.

content_types.title: Navigation
content_types.description: A reusable, ordered list of links. Reference one from header.main_navigation or a footer column.

content_types.title: Movie
content_types.description: A feature film entry with full metadata, cast references, and genre taxonomy.

content_types.title: Homepage Rail
content_types.description: A horizontal row of title cards. Used as a modular block on the homepage.

content_types.title: Hero Banner
content_types.description: Full-bleed hero with CTA. Used as a modular block on the homepage.

content_types.title: Header
content_types.description: Site header: logo, main navigation, and optional CTA.

content_types.title: Genre
content_types.description: Taxonomy term. Referenced by movie and tv_series entries.

content_types.title: Footer
content_types.description: Site footer: link columns (each referencing a navigation entry) and legal text.

content_types.title: Setup Guide
content_types.description: Singleton entry that drives the /setup Developer Guide page: intro, setup steps, feature deep-dives, and documentation links.
